productDisplayName: Q&Q Women Silver Dial Analog Watch
description: Style Note Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details have made us love this wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!   Product Details Case style: Golden stainless steel rectangular case Dial style: Silver dial with golden hands Strap style: Golden stylish bracelet style strap with a butterfly clasp  Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistant Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 18 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
